tools.name: search_games
tools.description: CDK Bot: search the catalog of digital products (game keys, gift cards, DLC) by title, platform, device, region, or language. Returns a best match with alternatives (smart matching). Use browse_filters first to see valid filter values.

tools.name: get_game_details
tools.description: CDK Bot: get detailed information about a specific digital product (game key, gift card, DLC) including price, activation instructions, and delivery time. Use the game_id from search_games results.

tools.name: browse_filters
tools.description: CDK Bot: list all available platforms, devices, regions, and languages for filtering digital product searches. Call this first to know what filter values are valid.

tools.name: get_price_quote
tools.description: CDK Bot: lock the current price for a digital product and get USDC payment instructions. Returns a quote_id valid for 5 minutes. After paying, use confirm_purchase with the tx_hash and quote_id.

tools.name: confirm_purchase
tools.description: CDK Bot: receive the product key after paying. Two ways to pay: (1) one-shot — pass x_payment, a signed EIP-3009 "exact" X-PAYMENT header (from accepts[] in get_price_quote); the facilitator settles it gaslessly, no tx_hash needed. (2) two-step — send USDC yourself, then pass tx_hash + quote_id.

tools.name: check_order
tools.description: CDK Bot: check the status of a purchase order. Provide wallet_address to retrieve the product key. Pending orders are automatically polled for fulfillment.

tools.name: request_refund
tools.description: CDK Bot: submit a refund claim for a purchased product key. Must be within 30 days of purchase. Delivery failures (not_delivered) are auto-approved instantly. Key issues are verified within 24 hours.

tools.name: submit_review
tools.description: CDK Bot: rate a completed purchase (1-5 stars). Helps improve the service. One review per order. Requires order_id and the wallet_address used for payment.
